suite.name: TS-F01-US3

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api_session, url=http://localhost:3000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

test.name: TC01 สร้าง Account Passenger และ Driver ผ่าน Web UI และเข้าหน้า Home

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Choose File
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Choose File
kw.doc: Inputs the ``file_path`` into the file input field ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: สมัครสมาชิกเรียบร้อยแล้ว!
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

test.doc: สมัครสมาชิกผ่านหน้าเว็บทั้งสอง Role แล้วทดสอบล็อกอิน

test.name: TC10, TC11 Passenger ทำการลบบัญชีผู้ใช้

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Deletes Account Passenger
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Mouse Over
kw.doc: Simulates hovering the mouse over the element ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${CHECKBOX} = xpath=//span[contains(text(), 'ยอมรับข้อกำหนดและเงื่อนไข')]/preceding-sibling::input[@type='checkbox']
kw.arg: xpath=//span[contains(text(), 'ยอมรับข้อกำหนดและเงื่อนไข')]/preceding-sibling::input[@type='checkbox']
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Select Checkbox
kw.msg: Selecting checkbox 'xpath=//span[contains(text(), 'ยอมรับข้อกำหนดและเงื่อนไข')]/preceding-sibling::input[@type='checkbox']'.
kw.doc: Selects the checkbox identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.msg: ${DELETE_BTN} = xpath=//button[contains(., 'ยืนยันการลบ')]
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(., 'ยืนยันการลบ')]
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[contains(., 'ยืนยันการลบ')]'.
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//input[@placeholder='กรอกอีเมลของคุณ']
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'testuser@gmail.com' into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder='กรอกอีเมลของคุณ']'.
kw.arg: xpath=//input[@placeholder='กรอกอีเมลของคุณ']
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(., 'ยืนยันการลบบัญชี')]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.msg: Clicking button 'xpath=//button[contains(., 'ยืนยันการลบบัญชี')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(., 'ยืนยันการลบบัญชี')]
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: xpath=//input[@placeholder="กรอกรหัสผ่านของคุณ"]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Typing password into text field 'xpath=//input[@placeholder="กรอกรหัสผ่านของคุณ"]'.
Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.arg: xpath=//input[@placeholder="กรอกรหัสผ่านของคุณ"]
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.arg: xpath=//button[span[text()="ยืนยันการลบบัญชี"]]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[span[text()="ยืนยันการลบบัญชี"]]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//button[span[text()="ยืนยันการลบบัญชี"]]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.msg: Element with locator 'xpath=//button[span[text()="ยืนยันการลบบัญชี"]]' not found.
kw.arg: xpath=//button[span[text()="ยืนยันการลบบัญชี"]]
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.
kw.status: Element with locator 'xpath=//button[span[text()="ยืนยันการลบบัญชี"]]' not found.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.arg: xpath=//button[span[text()="ยืนยันการลบบัญชี"]]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: ลบบัญชีสำเร็จแล้ว
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.status: Element with locator 'xpath=//button[span[text()="ยืนยันการลบบัญชี"]]' not found.

test.doc: รวบ TC11 (Login) และ TC12 (Delete) เข้าด้วยกันตาม Flow ใช้งานจริง
test.status: Element with locator 'xpath=//button[span[text()="ยืนยันการลบบัญชี"]]' not found.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

suite.doc: US1-การ anonymous ฝั่งผู้ใช้ที่เป็น Passenger
